sentences.target: Das Schloss am Fahrrad klemmt heute wieder.
sentences.reading: /das ʃlɔs am ˈfaːʁaːt klɛmt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈviːdɐ/

translations.de: Das Schloss am Fahrrad klemmt heute wieder.
translations.ipa: /das ʃlɔs am ˈfaːʁaːt klɛmt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈviːdɐ/
translations.en: The lock on the bike is sticking again.
translations.es: Hoy el candado de la bici se atasca otra vez.
translations.fr: L'antivol du vélo coince encore aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi il lucchetto della bici si blocca di nuovo.
translations.ko: 오늘 자전거 자물쇠가 또 안 돌아가.
translations.zh-Hans: 自行车的锁今天又卡住了。
translations.yue: 單車個鎖今日又卡住咗。
translations.ru: Сегодня замок на велосипеде опять заедает.
translations.pt: Hoje o cadeado da bicicleta está emperrando de novo.
translations.he: המנעול של האופניים נתקע שוב היום.
translations.vi: Ổ khóa xe đạp hôm nay lại kẹt.
translations.nl: Het slot van de fiets klemt vandaag weer.
translations.uk: Замок на велосипеді сьогодні знову заїдає.
translations.hu: Ma megint szorul a bicikli lakatja.
translations.hi: आज साइकिल का ताला फिर अटक रहा है.
translations.pl: Zamek w rowerze znów dziś się zacina.
translations.el: Η κλειδαριά του ποδηλάτου κολλάει πάλι σήμερα.
translations.nb: Sykkellåsen sitter fast igjen i dag.
translations.id: Gembok sepeda hari ini macet lagi.
translations.ro: Lacătul bicicletei se blochează din nou azi.
translations.cs: Dnes zámek na kole zase drhne.
translations.da: Cykellåsen sidder fast igen i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は自転車の鍵がまた固くて回らない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative neuter singular agreeing with 'Schloss'; marks the subject NP.
Noun; head of the subject; neuter nominative singular; here interpreted as 'lock'.
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a PP postmodifying 'Schloss' (location/attachment).
Noun; dative neuter singular as object of 'an' in the PP 'am Fahrrad'; head of that PP.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular present; predicate agreeing with the subject 'Schloss'.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.
Repetitive adverb modifying the predicate.

sentences.target: Das Schloss an der Tür ist kaputt.
sentences.reading: /das ʃlɔs an deːɐ̯ tyːɐ̯ ɪst kaˈpʊt/

translations.de: Das Schloss an der Tür ist kaputt.
translations.ipa: /das ʃlɔs an deːɐ̯ tyːɐ̯ ɪst kaˈpʊt/
translations.en: The lock on the door is broken.
translations.es: La cerradura de la puerta está rota.
translations.fr: La serrure de la porte est cassée.
translations.it: La serratura della porta è rotta.
translations.pt: A fechadura da porta está quebrada.
translations.vi: Ổ khóa ở cửa bị hỏng.
translations.nl: Het slot in de deur is kapot.
translations.el: Η κλειδαριά της πόρτας είναι χαλασμένη.
translations.da: Låsen i døren er i stykker.
translations.ja: ドアの鍵が壊れている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative neuter singular agreeing with 'Schloss'; marks the subject NP.
Noun; head of the subject; neuter nominative singular.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the PP 'an der Tür' postmodifying 'Schloss' (location).
Definite article; dative feminine singular agreeing with 'Tür' as object of 'an'.
Noun; head of the PP; dative feminine singular governed by 'an'.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; links subject to the predicative complement.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement with 'sein'.

sentences.target: Wir fahren morgen zum Schloss am See.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈfaːʁən ˈmɔʁɡn̩ tsʊm ʃlɔs am zeː/

translations.de: Wir fahren morgen zum Schloss am See.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈfaːʁən ˈmɔʁɡn̩ tsʊm ʃlɔs am zeː/
translations.en: We’re going to the castle by the lake tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana vamos al castillo junto al lago.
translations.fr: Demain, on va au château au bord du lac.
translations.it: Domani andiamo al castello vicino al lago.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天去湖边的城堡。
translations.yue: 我哋聽日去湖邊嗰座城堡。
translations.ru: Завтра мы поедем в замок у озера.
translations.pt: Amanhã vamos ao castelo à beira do lago.
translations.he: מחר אנחנו נוסעים לטירה שעל שפת האגם.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi đi tới lâu đài bên hồ.
translations.ar: غدًا سنذهب إلى القلعة عند البحيرة.
translations.nl: Morgen gaan we naar het kasteel bij het meer.
translations.uk: Завтра ми їдемо до замку біля озера.
translations.hu: Holnap elmegyünk a tó melletti kastélyhoz.
translations.hi: हम कल झील के किनारे वाले किले पर जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Jutro jedziemy do zamku nad jeziorem.
translations.el: Αύριο πάμε στο κάστρο δίπλα στη λίμνη.
translations.nb: I morgen drar vi til slottet ved innsjøen.
translations.id: Besok kami pergi ke kastil di tepi danau.
translations.sv: I morgon åker vi till slottet vid sjön.
translations.ro: Mâine mergem la castelul de lângă lac.
translations.cs: Zítra jedeme na zámek u jezera.
translations.da: I morgen tager vi til slottet ved søen.
translations.fi: Huomenna menemme järven rannalla olevaan linnaan.
translations.ja: 明日は湖のそばのお城に行く。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Finite main verb; 1st person plural present; motion verb.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.
Contraction of 'zu dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a goal-of-motion PP complement of 'fahren'.
Noun; dative neuter singular as object of 'zu'; head of the PP.
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a PP postmodifying 'Schloss' (location).
Noun; dative masculine singular as object of 'an' within 'am See'; head of that PP.

sentences.target: Er verliert ständig den Schlüssel fürs Schloss.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈliːɐ̯t ˈʃtɛndɪç deːn ˈʃlʏsəl fyːɐ̯s ʃlɔs/

translations.de: Er verliert ständig den Schlüssel fürs Schloss.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈliːɐ̯t ˈʃtɛndɪç deːn ˈʃlʏsəl fyːɐ̯s ʃlɔs/
translations.en: He keeps losing the key for the lock.
translations.es: Siempre pierde la llave del candado.
translations.fr: Il perd tout le temps la clé du cadenas.
translations.it: Perde sempre la chiave del lucchetto.
translations.zh-Hans: 他老是把锁的钥匙弄丢。
translations.ru: Он постоянно теряет ключ от замка.
translations.pt: Ele vive perdendo a chave do cadeado.
translations.he: הוא כל הזמן מאבד את המפתח של המנעול.
translations.vi: Anh ấy cứ làm mất chìa khóa của ổ khóa.
translations.nl: Hij raakt steeds de sleutel van het slot kwijt.
translations.uk: Він постійно губить ключ від замка.
translations.hi: वह ताले की चाबी बार-बार खो देता है.
translations.pl: On ciągle gubi klucz do zamka.
translations.el: Χάνει συνέχεια το κλειδί της κλειδαριάς.
translations.nb: Han mister stadig nøkkelen til låsen.
translations.id: Dia terus saja kehilangan kunci gembok.
translations.sv: Han tappar hela tiden nyckeln till låset.
translations.da: Han bliver ved med at miste nøglen til låsen.
translations.fi: Hän hukkaa koko ajan lukon avaimen.
translations.ja: 彼は鍵をしょっちゅうなくす。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular masculine nominative; subject.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular present; predicate.
Frequency adverb modifying the predicate.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular agreeing with 'Schlüssel'; marks the direct object NP.
Noun; head of the direct object; accusative masculine singular.
Contraction of 'für das'; preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP modifying 'Schlüssel' (intended use/purpose).
Noun; accusative neuter singular as object of 'für' in the PP 'fürs Schloss'.
